items.question: What industries do you work with?
items.answer: We support financial services, technology and professional services, with experience applicable to other sectors.

items.question: Do you provide ongoing compliance support?
items.answer: Yes. We offer periodic reviews and on-call advisory for internal controls and regulatory changes.

items.question: Can you coordinate with our external auditors?
items.answer: Absolutely. We prepare documentation and liaise to streamline requests and walkthroughs.

items.question: How do engagements typically start?
items.answer: We begin with a focused discovery to understand objectives, timelines and current state, then propose a clear scope.
